rows.notes: Top-of-page title; very clear and centered.
Account heading immediately below the page title; clearly written and centered.
Left-side receipt. The amount '364 2' is clearly aligned in the left £/s columns; no pence figure visible so pence set to 0.

Left-side repeated/underlined figure directly beneath the receipt — appears to be the left-side subtotal/posted amount for the Library Account. Amount digits are clear but the description cell is blank/just a posted total.
Right-side payment. Description and amount (42 11 4) are legible and aligned to the right £/s/d columns.
Right-side payment. '6 0 .' (6 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence) is clear and aligned in the right £/s/d columns.
Right-side payment. '31 19 4' is clearly visible and within valid shillings/pence ranges.

Right-side payment. Amount reads '229 8 4' but the final '4' shows a faint strike-through; the page-specific guidance notes this line is struck-through. I transcribed the digits as visible but lowered confidence due to the strike-through on the pence digit.
Right-side total for Library Account (mirrors left receipt total). Clearly aligned; digits legible.
Centered account heading; clearly written.
Left-side receipt for the Pension Fund. Amount '722 4 3' is legible and aligned in left £/s/d columns.

Left-side receipt. Amount '2102 7 6' is clear. The descriptive wording is partly indistinct in handwriting ('Sherrington' is my best reading of the script); spelling of the place/name is uncertain, hence moderate confidence.
Left-side receipt. '200' is clearly visible in the left £ column with no shillings/pence visible.
Left-side total for Pension Fund (3024 11 9). Well aligned and used as an alignment reference on the page; digits are legible.

Right-side payment. First amount in the Pension payments column reads as '2101 17 7' though the description is abbreviated/inked; alignment with the Pension total supports this reading but the handwriting of the description is moderately unclear.

Right-side payment. Small amount under the first payment; the digits are faint and crowded. I read '11 1 1' but individual digits (particularly the second shilling digit) are not crisp — low confidence. Value chosen keeps all columns within valid ranges.

Right-side payment. There is a mid-sized amount roughly '900' visible but the shillings/pence digits are faint; I have recorded as 900 pounds, 0s, 0d to avoid over-interpreting faint marks. Low confidence due to faint/blurred digits.
Right-side total for Pension Fund. The total '3024 11 9' is visible and used as an alignment reference; individual intermediate rows are less clear but the total itself is legible.
Double-headed center grouping: left reads 'Local Rates' and right reads 'Composition Fund' (titles appear across the center). Both headings are legible.
Left-side receipt under 'Local Rates'. '8 17 6' is clear and aligned in the left £/s/d columns.
Left-side receipt. '37 9 7' is legible and aligned.

Left-side receipt. The dividends line is short and the shillings/pence column marks are faint; I read a small amount '9' pounds with no clear shillings/pence marks. Moderate confidence due to faintness.
Left-side carried balance. '97 10 11' is reasonably clear and used to reach the subtotal visible below.
Left-side subtotal for Local Rates, reads '152 15 0' clearly in the left totals column.
Right-side closing balance for Composition Fund corresponding to the left subtotal; digits are well aligned and legible.
Centered account heading; clear.
Left-side receipt. '2722 14' is visible; there is no explicit pence digit so pence set to 0. Slight uncertainty on the exact shillings digit due to flourished handwriting.
Left-side receipt. '14 15 5' is clearly written and aligned in the left £/s/d columns.
Left-side total for receipts shows '2737 9 5' in the stacked totals box; the figures are aligned though surrounding small figures are slightly crowded.
Left-side carried balance in the small stacked totals area. The larger pound figure is readable but cramped; moderate confidence due to crowding of digits.

A combined total appears in the stacked totals block beneath receipts, but the exact grouping and some digits are crowded and faint. I have recorded the visually plausible combined figure from the stacked column (pounds appear large); confidence is low because the stacked sums are cramped and partly faded.
Right-side payment. '2146 13 4' is clearly written next to the 'Tutors & Lecturers (being Fellows)' description.
Right-side payment. '277 4 6' aligns with the 'do (not being Fellows)' line and is legible.
Right-side payment. '23 9 6' clear and aligned with the Fees line.
Right-side payment. '29 13 5' is legible though the label uses an abbreviation; alignment is clear.
Right-side payment. '150' pounds is clearly visible in the pounds column; no shillings/pence marks visible.

Right-side payment. The amount '12 1 10' is visible but faint and there is a faint strike on the '1' (page-specific guidance notes this). I transcribed the digits as they appear but confidence is lowered due to the faint strike-through on the shillings digit.
Right-side payment. '200' is clear and aligns with the transfer line.
Right-side payment. '500' is clearly written in the pounds column for Investment.
Right-side total for Tuition Fund payments appears as '3339 8 7' and is reasonably clear in the right totals column.
Right-side balance for Tuition Fund visible but somewhat compressed; pence digit is not explicitly visible so set to 0. Moderate confidence due to cramped numerals in the stacked totals area.

A further summed total for the Tuition block is visible (appears as '3444 5 7' or similar). The stacked totals in this section are crowded and some digits are faint; the figure recorded is the best reading from the stacked column but confidence is moderate-to-low.
Centered account heading; clear.
Left-side receipt for Exhibition Fund. '201 6 8' is legible and aligned.
Left-side carried balance '56 6 8' is clear and aligned.
Left-side subtotal '257 13 4' is clearly written and aligned in the totals column.
Right-side payment. '237 13 4' is legible and matches the 'Paid to Exhibitions' description.
Right-side closing balance for Exhibition Fund. Subtraction yields '20 0 0'; the digits are visible though the small zero pence/shillings are lightly written.
Centered heading for the final account section; clear.

Left-side receipt reads '41 8' in the left £/s columns. The pence digit is not visible/explicit; I set pence to 0. Confidence lowered because the bottom-left area shows some faint marks and the final pence column is blank.
Left-side carried balance repeats the '41 8' figure in the stacked small column; pence not explicit. Moderate confidence due to small faint numerals.
Right-side payment. '29 5 6' is legible in the right payment column next to the 'Sundry Prices &c' (handwritten as 'Sundry Prices' or 'Sundry Prizes') description.

Right-side closing line. The second right-hand figure beneath 'Sundry Prices' reads roughly '12 2 6' (so that 29 5 6 + 12 2 6 = 41 8 0). The digits are moderately faint and cramped near the lower-right area, so confidence is reduced.

Final right-side total for Undergraduates Reading Room Fund. The bottom-right corner is heavily stained/obscured (water/burn), and the final digits of this total are partly illegible; page-specific guidance indicates the printed total '41 8 .' is obscured. I recorded the discernible pounds and shillings (41 and 8) and set pence to 0. Confidence is low due to the stain and partial obliteration of the pence column.
